calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2025 Off Calendar

Notice And Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SAMUEL SCHRYVER ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, AS A PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL's Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Granted, no opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)
